narrative:
Precinct Middle Point (precinct in Van Wert County) has 363 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.8 percentage points.
